questions: What are key takeaways from ARF’s How Advertising Works Today?
How should advertisers plan across channels?
qa.answer: Cross‑platform reach drives effectiveness; creative quality dominates outcomes; and continuity with optimal frequency matters. Combining TV/AV with digital increases incremental reach and sales impact.
implication: Invest in high‑quality creative; maintain presence with managed frequency.
Plan cross‑media to extend reach and avoid excessive overlap.
Use lift studies and MMM to quantify cross‑channel synergies.
